name: nVent Electric / nVent Electric
sector: Electrical connection and enclosures / 电气连接与机柜
summary: nVent 提供电气连接、机柜和热管理产品，是数据中心配电、保护和热管理系统的配套层。 / nVent provides electrical connection, enclosures, and thermal-management products, supporting data-center power distribution, protection, and thermal systems.
summaryZh: nVent 提供电气连接、机柜和热管理产品，是数据中心配电、保护和热管理系统的配套层。
summaryEn: nVent provides electrical connection, enclosures, and thermal-management products, supporting data-center power distribution, protection, and thermal systems.

business.description: 公司提供电气连接与保护、机柜、热管理和电气解决方案，服务数据中心、工业和商业基础设施。 / The company provides electrical connection and protection, enclosures, thermal management, and electrical solutions for data centers, industrial, and commercial infrastructure.
business.descriptionZh: 公司提供电气连接与保护、机柜、热管理和电气解决方案，服务数据中心、工业和商业基础设施。
business.descriptionEn: The company provides electrical connection and protection, enclosures, thermal management, and electrical solutions for data centers, industrial, and commercial infrastructure.
revenueModel: 机柜与连接 / enclosures and connection

business.thesis: AI 数据中心建设需要更高密度的机柜、连接、保护和热管理，nVent 处于电力与散热的配套设备层。 / AI data-center buildout needs denser enclosures, connection, protection, and thermal management, placing nVent in the support-equipment layer for power and cooling.
business.thesisZh: AI 数据中心建设需要更高密度的机柜、连接、保护和热管理，nVent 处于电力与散热的配套设备层。
business.thesisEn: AI data-center buildout needs denser enclosures, connection, protection, and thermal management, placing nVent in the support-equipment layer for power and cooling.
riskNotes: 数据中心相关产品占比和项目周期需继续核实。 / Data-center product exposure and project cycles require further verification.
工业需求和原材料成本会影响毛利。 / Industrial demand and raw-material costs affect margins.

themeExposure.rationaleZh: nVent 处于配电、机柜、连接和热管理配套层，相关性明确但通常低于核心电力设备和液冷系统供应商。
themeExposure.rationaleEn: nVent sits in power distribution, enclosures, connection, and thermal support; relevance is clear but usually below core power-equipment and liquid-cooling suppliers.
